assertions.description: PaymentRequest is exposed — the surface that invokes Secure Payment Confirmation flows.
PaymentRequest.prototype.show is a function — the call that triggers SPC and, with browser-bound keys, signs over an extra device-bound key.
Secure Payment Confirmation feature detection is available when implemented, with WebAuthn still exposed as the underlying credential surface.
navigator.credentials is exposed — SPC credential creation and assertion ride the WebAuthn surface that now also returns a browser-bound key signature.
PublicKeyCredential is exposed — SPC assertions are PublicKeyCredential instances; the new browser-bound signature is carried alongside.
crypto.subtle is exposed — the browser uses platform crypto to mint the device-bound key pair.
